bead.title: Add governed-workflow methods to TypeScript SDK per CONTRACT-009
bead.description: CONTRACT-009 (docs/helix/02-design/contracts/CONTRACT-009-sdk-surface.md) specifies governed-workflow methods that are absent from sdk/typescript: previewMutation, commitIntent, approveIntent, rejectIntent, explainPolicy, queryAudit, rollbackDryRun. The server-side capabilities exist (FEAT-029/FEAT-030 builds: crates/axon-api/src/{intent,policy}.rs and GraphQL intents contract tests). Implement these methods on the GraphQL-first client.
bead.acceptance: sdk/typescript/src exports previewMutation, commitIntent, approveIntent, rejectIntent, explainPolicy, queryAudit, and rollbackDryRun on the client; each has an SDK test exercising the corresponding GraphQL operation against the intents/policy contract fixtures; SDK build and tests pass.
